chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH KARACHI Constitutional Petition No. D – 2145 of 2023 DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF JUDGES Disposed of matter: For hearing of CMA No.16088/2025 (U/S 151 CPC) 01.09.2025 Mr. Manzar Hussain, Advocate for the Petitioner. Mr. Aamir Ali Shaikh, Advocate for Respondent No.2. Mr. Muhammad Akbar Khan, Asstt. Attorney General. -------------------------------------- Instant petition was disposed of vide order dated 08.05.2023. Pursuant to the noted order, the Petitioner deposited the disputed amount before the Nazir of this Court. Subsequently, it is submitted by the learned counsel for the petitioner that petitioner has settled the dispute with respondent No.2. Thereafter, the concerned Collectorate issued NOC to the Nazir of this Court indicating therein that the dispute has been resolved. Contention of the counsel appears to be correct. Learned counsel appearing on behalf of the respondent No.2 has accorded his no objection to the grant of listed application. Accordingly, the application is allowed as prayed. Nazir is directed to release the amount deposited pursuant to order dated 08.05.2023 along with any profit accumulated thereon, subject to deposit of certificate(s) by the petitioner. JUDGE JUDGE Nadeem
